bird.name: Saipan reed warbler
bird.summary: The Saipan reed warbler or gå'ga' karisu in Chamorro (Acrocephalus hiwae) is an endangered songbird of the Northern Mariana Islands. Taxono…

locations.name: 湿地
locations.summary: 濕地（wetland）是永久或季節性被较浅的水（少于6米的淡水、半咸水或海水）掩蓋的獨特自然环境，是一種許多缺氧過程具有優勢的半水生生態系統，也是陸地生態系統和水域生態系統之間的過渡性地帶。有許多水生植物生長在土壤长期被水体浸泡的特定濕地…

relations.subject: Saipan reed warbler
relations.evidence: An estimated population of 2700 birds was reported in 2009 on Saipan, and on Alamagan 950 birds were reported in 2010. It inhabits wetlands, thickets and the margins of forests

relations.subject: Saipan reed warbler
relations.evidence: An estimated population of 2700 birds was reported in 2009 on Saipan, and on Alamagan 950 birds were reported in 2010. It inhabits wetlands, thickets and the margins of forests
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: Saipan reed warbler
relations.evidence: Threats to the survival of the Saipan reed warbler include habitat destruction resulting from urban development and agriculture, the introduction of invasive species, and volcanic eruptions
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
